fields.name: x_psm_0502_request_source_id
fields.help: Entry point of the 0502 flow for this maintenance request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_source_system
fields.help: Technical or upstream system origin of the maintenance request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_request_origin_group
fields.help: Business-friendly grouping of the actual origin of the maintenance need at phase 3 step 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_source_reference
fields.help: Reference number or upstream document code from the source system.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_source_note
fields.help: Additional note explaining the upstream source mapping or origin context.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_intake_minimum_ready
fields.help: Indicates whether the request already has the minimum source-side data expected at phase 3 step 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_intake_minimum_gap_reason
fields.help: Missing minimum data labels that still prevent the request from being considered complete at phase 3 step 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_intake_template_guide
fields.help: Guidance template that explains which initial questions should be captured for this request type at phase 3 step 2.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_intake_example_note
fields.help: Example intake note inherited from the request type to help the user capture the initial information consistently.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_proposal_template_guide
fields.help: Guidance template inherited from the request type to help the user structure the treatment proposal consistently.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_intake_detail_ready
fields.help: Indicates whether the request already has the richer intake information expected at phase 3 step 2.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_intake_detail_gap_reason
fields.help: Missing labels that still block the request from being considered intake-complete at phase 3 step 2.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_intake_problem_detail
fields.help: Detailed initial problem description captured at the intake stage.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_intake_impact_scope
fields.help: Initial business impact scope captured at the intake stage.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_intake_contact_name
fields.help: Primary contact person captured during the initial intake.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_intake_contact_phone
fields.help: Primary contact phone captured during the initial intake.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_inspection_doc_no
fields.help: Sequence number of the 0502 initial inspection document.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_proposal_doc_no
fields.help: Sequence number of the 0502 treatment proposal document.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_issue_doc_no
fields.help: Sequence number of the 0502 material issue request document.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_acceptance_doc_no
fields.help: Sequence number of the 0502 acceptance record document.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_department_id
fields.help: Store department that raised the 0502 maintenance request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_request_type_id
fields.help: Business type of the 0502 maintenance request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_received_by_id
fields.help: CMT user who acknowledged the maintenance request into the intake flow.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_received_at
fields.help: Date and time when the CMT intake acknowledged the maintenance request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_intake_owner_user_id
fields.help: User currently considered the owner of the 0502 intake checkpoint.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_intake_sla_deadline_at
fields.help: Deadline for the CMT intake checkpoint derived from the maintenance team SLA configuration.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_intake_sla_result
fields.help: Stored SLA result once the intake checkpoint has been reached.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_intake_age_hours
fields.help: Elapsed hours from request entry into the system until CMT receives it, or until now if still pending.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_progress_checkpoint
fields.help: Operational progress checkpoint used by phase 3 monitoring to show where the request is currently bottlenecked.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_supply_branch_status
fields.help: Operational status of the internal material, stock issue, and outside purchase branch for phase 3 monitoring.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_inspection_result
fields.help: Initial on-site inspection conclusion for the 0502 flow.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_inspection_note
fields.help: Initial inspection findings captured by CMT.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_inspection_checklist_template
fields.help: Checklist template inherited from the equipment category for phase 3 step 4.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_inspection_worksheet_template
fields.help: Worksheet template inherited from the equipment category for phase 3 step 4.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_inspection_checklist_result
fields.help: Actual checklist result recorded by CMT during the initial inspection.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_inspection_worksheet
fields.help: Structured worksheet note recorded by CMT during the initial inspection.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_inspection_symptom_status
fields.help: Structured result describing whether the reported symptom was confirmed on site.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_inspection_equipment_status
fields.help: Operational status of the equipment at the time of the initial inspection.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_inspection_safety_risk
fields.help: Safety risk level assessed during the initial inspection.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_inspection_action_urgency
fields.help: Urgency level for the follow-up action after the initial inspection.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_inspected_by_id
fields.help: User who performed the initial inspection.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_inspected_at
fields.help: Date and time when the initial inspection was recorded.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_lead_notified_user_id
fields.help: User considered as the CMT Lead for the phase 1 notification.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_lead_notification_rule
fields.help: Resolution rule used to determine who received the 0502 preventive lead notification.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_lead_notified_at
fields.help: Date and time when the preventive request was surfaced to the CMT Lead.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_lead_acknowledgment_status
fields.help: Shows whether the notified lead has acknowledged the preventive assignment.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_lead_acknowledged_by_id
fields.help: Lead user who acknowledged the preventive assignment.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_lead_acknowledged_at
fields.help: Date and time when the notified lead acknowledged the preventive assignment.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_plan_note
fields.help: Simple planning note for phase 1 before introducing a full planning flow.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_plan_change_reason
fields.help: Reason entered when a planned schedule or responsible user is changed in phase 3.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_ready_to_plan
fields.help: Technical indicator showing whether the request is ready for the planning step.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_planning_block_reason
fields.help: Summary of missing business prerequisites before the request can be planned.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_planned_by_id
fields.help: User who confirmed the request had been planned in phase 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_planned_at
fields.help: Date and time when the request was marked as planned in phase 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_planning_history_ids
fields.help: Planning history lines captured for the request when the schedule is planned or revised in phase 3.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_planning_revision_count
fields.help: Number of planning history revisions recorded for this request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_last_planning_changed_by_id
fields.help: Latest user who changed the planning revision of this request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_last_planning_changed_at
fields.help: Latest date and time when the planning revision of this request changed.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_fsm_task_id
fields.help: Field Service task created from this maintenance request in phase 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_treatment_proposal
fields.help: Initial treatment proposal captured in phase 1 before a formal quotation flow is introduced.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_proposal_document
fields.help: Proposal document artifact generated from the structured proposal fields in phase 3.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_root_cause_analysis
fields.help: Structured root cause analysis captured for the treatment proposal in phase 2.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_technical_solution
fields.help: Structured technical handling proposal captured in phase 2.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_estimated_cost
fields.help: Estimated handling cost proposed by CMT in phase 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_estimated_timeline
fields.help: Estimated handling timeline captured in phase 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_cost_note
fields.help: Structured note explaining the cost assumptions or breakdown in phase 2.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_timeline_note
fields.help: Structured note explaining the proposed handling timeline in phase 2.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_proposal_change_reason
fields.help: Reason entered when a proposed treatment proposal is revised in phase 3.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_proposed_by_id
fields.help: User who confirmed the treatment proposal in phase 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_proposed_at
fields.help: Date and time when the treatment proposal was recorded in phase 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_proposal_history_ids
fields.help: Proposal history lines captured when the request is first proposed or later revised in phase 3.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_proposal_revision_count
fields.help: Number of proposal history revisions recorded for this request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_last_proposal_changed_by_id
fields.help: Latest user who changed the proposal revision of this request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_last_proposal_changed_at
fields.help: Latest date and time when the proposal revision of this request changed.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_proposal_revision_compare
fields.help: Quick comparison summary between the latest proposal revision and the previous one.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_status
fields.help: Simple approval decision for timeline and estimated cost in phase 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_required
fields.help: Indicates whether the treatment proposal requires manual approval after applying the phase 2 cost rule.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_user_id
fields.help: Resolved approver for the treatment proposal in phase 2.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_rule
fields.help: Resolver rule used to determine who approves the treatment proposal in phase 2.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_cost_rule
fields.help: Cost rule applied when the treatment proposal enters the approval step in phase 2.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_decided_by_id
fields.help: User who made the phase 1 approval decision.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_decided_at
fields.help: Date and time when the phase 1 approval decision was recorded.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_note
fields.help: Simple note captured for the approval or rejection decision in phase 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_flow_type
fields.help: Indicates whether the proposal follows a single-level or two-level approval flow in phase 3 step 12.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_level_count
fields.help: Total number of approval levels resolved for this proposal.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_current_level
fields.help: Current active approval level for the proposal while it is pending.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_initial_user_id
fields.help: First-level approver resolved when the proposal is first submitted for approval.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_final_user_id
fields.help: Second-level final approver when the store side requires two-level approval for the proposal.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_first_decided_by_id
fields.help: User who completed the first approval level before the request moved to the final approver.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_approval_first_decided_at
fields.help: Date and time when the first approval level was completed.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_need_outside_service
fields.help: Indicates whether the request should branch to outside service instead of internal handling.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_service_route
fields.help: Structured routing decision used in phase 2 to clarify whether the request stays internal or goes to outside service.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_service_route_reason
fields.help: Structured reason explaining why the request is routed internally or to outside service.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_service_assessment_note
fields.help: Assessment note explaining whether the request can be handled internally or requires outside service.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_service_assessed_by_id
fields.help: User who assessed whether outside service is needed in phase 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_service_assessed_at
fields.help: Date and time when the internal/outside service route was assessed in phase 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_outside_service_request_ids
fields.help: Outside service requests created when the 0502 maintenance flow is routed to a vendor.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_outside_service_request_id
fields.help: Latest outside service request linked to this 0502 maintenance request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_outside_service_request_count
fields.help: Number of outside service requests linked to this 0502 maintenance request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_outside_service_state
fields.help: Current state of the latest outside service request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_has_material_request
fields.help: Indicates whether the approved internal handling requires material to be issued from stock.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_line_ids
fields.help: Structured material detail lines captured during the phase 2 material assessment step.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_line_count
fields.help: Number of structured material detail lines linked to the request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_assessment_note
fields.help: Assessment note explaining whether material is required before repair can continue.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_checked_by_id
fields.help: User who assessed whether material is required in phase 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_checked_at
fields.help: Date and time when the material requirement was assessed in phase 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_stock_picking_id
fields.help: Internal stock picking created from this maintenance request in phase 1.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_stock_picking_state
fields.help: Current state of the linked stock picking.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_stock_availability
fields.help: Current availability message computed live from the linked stock picking.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_stock_availability_state
fields.help: Current technical availability state computed live from the linked stock picking.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_stock_check_availability
fields.help: Availability message captured at the moment the user checked stock availability.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_stock_check_availability_state
fields.help: Technical availability state captured at the moment the user checked stock availability.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_stock_check_result
fields.help: Snapshot decision captured from the linked stock picking when stock availability was checked.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_stock_checked_by_id
fields.help: User who checked stock availability in phase 1 step 16.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_stock_checked_at
fields.help: Date and time when stock availability was checked in phase 1 step 16.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_approval_required
fields.help: Indicates whether the internal material issue request requires manual approval after applying the phase 2 material rule.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_approval_user_id
fields.help: Resolved internal approver responsible for the 0502 material issue request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_approval_rule
fields.help: Resolution rule used to choose the approver for the 0502 internal material issue request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_approval_value
fields.help: Estimated material value snapshot captured when the internal material issue request was submitted for approval.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_approval_value_rule
selection: Manual Review Required By Source Type
fields.help: Decision rule applied to the material issue request based on the estimated material value and source type mix.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_approval_status
fields.help: Stores the internal approval decision before stock issue in phase 1 step 17 and phase 2 step 17.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_approval_decided_by_id
fields.help: User who approved or rejected the material issue request in phase 1 step 17.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_approval_decided_at
fields.help: Date and time when the material approval decision was made in phase 1 step 17.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_material_approval_note
fields.help: Approval note explaining why the material issue request was approved or rejected.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_stock_issued_by_id
fields.help: User who confirmed the actual stock issue in phase 1 step 18.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_stock_issued_at
fields.help: Date and time when the linked stock picking was considered issued in phase 1 step 18.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_stock_issue_status
fields.help: Business status of the internal stock issue branch, synchronized from the linked stock picking in phase 2 step 18.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_stock_issue_synced_at
fields.help: Date and time when the internal stock issue business status was last synchronized from the linked stock picking.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_fsm_stage_id
fields.help: Current stage of the linked FSM task used as the main execution object in phase 1 step 20.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_fsm_is_closed
fields.help: Indicates whether the linked FSM task has reached a closed state.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_execution_started_by_id
fields.help: User who confirmed that technical execution started in phase 1 step 20.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_execution_started_at
fields.help: Date and time when execution was marked as started in phase 1 step 20.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_execution_completed_by_id
fields.help: User who confirmed that technical execution was completed in phase 1 step 20.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_execution_completed_at
fields.help: Date and time when execution was marked as completed in phase 1 step 20.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_execution_note
fields.help: Summary note of the repair execution in phase 1 step 20. Detailed technical work remains on the FSM task.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_acceptance_result
fields.help: Structured post-maintenance acceptance result captured in phase 2 step 21.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_acceptance_contact_name
fields.help: Name of the store-side or requester-side representative who reviewed the maintenance result.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_acceptance_contact_role
fields.help: Role or title of the store-side representative who reviewed the maintenance result.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_acceptance_equipment_result
fields.help: Observed equipment condition at the time of post-maintenance acceptance.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_acceptance_note
fields.help: Structured conclusion and evaluation note after maintenance completion in phase 2 step 21.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_acceptance_follow_up_note
fields.help: Required follow-up or rework note when post-maintenance acceptance is not fully accepted.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_acceptance_reviewed_by_id
fields.help: User who recorded the post-maintenance acceptance decision in phase 1 step 21.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_acceptance_reviewed_at
fields.help: Date and time when the post-maintenance acceptance was recorded in phase 1 step 21.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_rework_round_count
fields.help: Number of times this request has been reopened after acceptance required follow-up or rework.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_rework_history_ids
fields.help: History lines created each time this request is reopened for rework.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_last_rework_at
fields.help: Date and time when this request was last reopened for rework.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_last_rework_by_id
fields.help: User who last reopened this request for rework.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_purchase_order_ids
fields.help: Outside purchase orders linked to this maintenance request in phase 1 step 19.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_purchase_order_count
fields.help: Number of outside purchase orders linked to this maintenance request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_purchase_order_id
fields.help: Latest linked outside purchase order for this maintenance request.

fields.name: x_psm_0502_purchase_order_state
fields.help: State of the latest outside purchase order linked to this maintenance request.
